doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The Legal Services Trust Fund Commission lacks authority to unilaterally waive Business & Professions Code §6125, and no such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in any verifiable State Bar of California records.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: This document describes a radical departure from California's unauthorized practice of law framework that would require legislative action, not merely a State Bar commission protocol; no such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in State Bar records, the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission lacks authority to waive B&P Code §6125, and the specific provisions (e.g., §1170(d) reference, the 72-hour waiver of attorney review) appear invented.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: The Legal Services Trust Fund Commission lacks authority to unilaterally waive Business & Professions Code §6125, and no such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in any verifiable State Bar of California records.
